title: How A Firm Tried To Fix Goldman Sachs Executive's Epstein-Linked Image
content: The report said Terakeet then spent nearly 20 months trying to reduce the impact of the negative publicity.

title: Indian Autonomous Combat Aircraft To Be Manufactured In Europe For 1st Time
content: Flying Wedge Defence & Aerospace announced its first international manufacturing node in Portugal for its flagship autonomous combat aircraft, Kaal Bhairava.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex, Nifty Trade Flat After Trump Warns Iran 'Clock Is Ticking'
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Brent advanced toward US$111 a barrel, after adding almost 8 per cent last week.

title: 'Gave 11 Lakhs, Scorpio, But...': Father Of Greater Noida Woman Found Dead
content: The father, who filed a police complaint, alleged his daughter's in-laws demanded an additional dowry of Rs 50 lakh and a Fortuner car.

title: US Iran War News Live Updates: "Clock Is ticking": Trump Warns 'Nothing Will Be Left' Of Iran Without Deal
content: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

title: 'Bail Is Rule Even In UAPA': Supreme Court Critiques Own Umar Khalid Order
content: A bench of Justices BV Nagarathna and Ujjal Bhuyan said an earlier judgment rejecting bail to Khalid and Imam appeared to dilute the binding precedent laid down by a larger bench in the landmark Union of India vs KA Najeeb case.

title: After PM Modi's Visit, Sweden Now A Strategic Partner: What India Gains
content: PM Modi Sweden Visit: As India is positioning itself as a trusted manufacturing, R&D, and digital partner for Europe, Sweden becomes a gateway.

title: Leaked 'Cypher' Spotlights US Role In Pakistan Ex-PM Imran Khan's Ouster
content: The former Pakistani Prime Minister has repeatedly claimed that the United States has conspired with Pakistan's opposition parties to remove him because of his independent foreign policy and refusal to fully align with Washington against Russia and C

title: Who Was Twisha Sharma, MBA Graduate, Found Dead 5 Months After Wedding?
content: Twisha held an MBA degree and had worked for several years in Delhi before her marriage. Apart from this, she appeared in the Telugu film Mugguru Monagallu.

title: "I'm Trapped. Tu Mat Phasna": Twisha Sharma's Chat With Friend Before Death
content: Twisha, originally from Noida in Uttar Pradesh, was found hanging at her husband Samarth Singh's house in Bhopal's Katara Hills area on May 12.

title: "I Feel Suffocated, Ma": Noida's Twisha Sharma Wanted To Return Home
content: WhatsApp chats between Twisha and her mother have revealed that she felt 'trapped' in an unhappy marriage and was being mentally harassed.

title: Inside Small UK Operations Room Handling Persian Gulf Ship Emergencies
content: Whenever commercial vessels come under attack or face security threats in the region, captains often contact the UKMTO first for guidance and emergency coordination.

title: New York Woman Gives Birth In Court During Hearing On Drug Charges
content: The NYPD said Randazzo was wearing loose clothing at the time of her arrest and did not initially tell officers she was pregnant.

title: 'I'm trapped': Ex-judge's daughter-in-law's last text before alleged suicide over dowry harassment
content: A 33-year-old woman, Twisha Sharma, was found dead at her matrimonial home in Bhopal, with surfaced chats indicating mounting emotional distress. Her family alleges dowry harassment and is demanding a fresh post-mortem examination in Delhi, while police have formed an SIT to investigate her husband and his mother.

title: Pilot still holding controls: Man who entered Air India crash morgue recounts chilling scenes
content: Chilling details emerge from the Air India AI-171 crash mortuary, with a witness describing horrific scenes. The captain's body was found seated, still clutching the controls, suggesting a desperate attempt to save the aircraft. Investigations into pilot error versus technical failure continue, with conflicting timelines and CCTV footage raising new questions.

title: Fuel gets Rs 3 costlier: Rise in inflation or no impact? What it means for India
content: Fuel prices in India saw their first hike in four years, with petrol and diesel increasing by Rs 3. This move aims to alleviate significant daily losses incurred by oil marketing companies, estimated at Rs 1,000 crore. While consumer inflation may see a slight uptick, the fiscal impact is considered minimal, with annual consumption expected to recover.

title: ‘Fit lag raha hu na’: Dhoni trains with NSG as CSK fans wait for Chepauk return
content: MS Dhoni's visit to the NSG Hub, showcasing his fitness and shooting skills, coincides with a high-stakes IPL 2026 match for CSK. With Dhoni sidelined by injury and speculation rife about his final Chepauk appearance, fans anticipate an emotional farewell, regardless of his playing status. The team's playoff hopes hinge on upcoming wins.

title: Trump’s cryptic Gulf map with red arrows at Iran sparks fresh war fears
content: US President Trump has ignited controversy by tweeting a provocative map aimed at Iran, declaring that 'the clock is ticking' in reference to potential military engagement. This revelation comes on the heels of his discussions with Israeli PM Netanyahu, signaling escalating tensions.

title: Flyers from angry Meta staff appear in meeting rooms and toilet: Here's what they say
content: Meta employees are protesting the company's new mouse-tracking software, the Model Capability Initiative (MCI), with flyers in US offices and a petition citing the National Labor Relations Act. The tool records keystrokes, clicks and screenshots to train Meta's AI agents—just days before the May 20 layoffs cutting 8,000 jobs. UK staff have also launched a unionisation drive with United Tech and Allied Workers.

title: ‘Not happening today!’: Is Ashwin hinting at MS Dhoni’s retirement in 2027?
content: Chennai Super Kings fans are buzzing with anticipation for MS Dhoni's potential appearance in their final home game against Sunrisers Hyderabad.  Despite cryptic social media posts from R Ashwin hinting at his absence, Dhoni's recent net session has fueled speculation.  The team's 'Lap of Honour' announcement further intensified retirement talks, making this match a highly emotional affair.

title: 'Became CM by influencing through Instagram': Stalin takes jibe at Tamil Nadu CM Vijay
content: DMK president MK Stalin criticised Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) leader Joseph Vijay, alleging he became Chief Minister by influencing children via Instagram and failed to appoint booth agents. Stalin also highlighted rising murders in Tamil Nadu, questioning the new government's ability to maintain law and order, drawing parallels to past governance issues.

title: 'He must have a lot going on': Ashwin reacts to Ponting’s lone dugout moment
content: Punjab Kings' IPL 2026 campaign is on the brink of elimination after a sixth consecutive defeat. Head coach Ricky Ponting's dejected demeanor went viral, highlighting the team's struggles. Former India all-rounder Ravichandran Ashwin pointed to structural issues, including the decision to split home games between Mullanpur and Dharamshala, disrupting player rhythm and familiarity with conditions.

title: Salesforce CEO who halted hiring sees company spending millions on Anthropic tokens
content: Salesforce is significantly boosting AI spending, projecting hundreds of millions on Anthropic tokens, while halting software engineer hiring. CEO Marc Benioff highlights AI's role in enhancing engineer productivity by over 30%, enabling faster output and lower development costs. This strategic shift reflects a broader tech trend of leveraging AI for efficiency, with humans still integral to operations.

title: No degree, no advice: China cracks down on 'fake experts', bars uncertified influencers
content: China is implementing stringent new regulations for its influencer economy. Content creators discussing sensitive topics like health and law will need verified professional qualifications. Platforms must also ensure AI-generated content is clearly disclosed. This move aims to elevate information standards, though concerns linger about potential impacts on public discourse.

title: Fresh blow to AIADMK: Former minister Semmalai resigns, cites internal conflict
content: Senior AIADMK leader S Semmalai has resigned, citing deep dissatisfaction with the party's current state and recent developments post-elections. He expressed immense mental anguish, stating that internal infighting has damaged the party's image, even drawing ridicule from English newspapers. Semmalai, who felt sidelined after Jayalalithaa's death, lamented the party's deviation from its founding principles.

title: Shark Tank India judge Anupam Mittal shares thoughts on Oracle's 12,000 layoffs
content: Shark Tank India judge Anupam Mittal commented on Oracle's recent layoffs and rescinded job offers, attributing them to automation rather than financial issues. He advised professionals to assess their position on an employer's P&L statement, suggesting those in the 'cost column' are at risk, while those contributing to revenue or profit can leverage AI.

title: 'All will be forgiven in Washington': Secret Pak cipher hints at US role in Imran Khan's fall
content: A resurfaced Pakistani diplomatic cable alleges US involvement in Imran Khan's 2022 ouster. The document, citing a meeting with a US official, suggests American concerns over Khan's Russia stance and hints that his removal via a no-confidence vote would mend ties. Khan's party views this as proof of foreign interference in Pakistan's politics.

title: ‘I didn’t drop him because…’: Ganguly reveals how he fought selectors for Dravid
content: Sourav Ganguly revealed he shielded Rahul Dravid from selectors concerned about his ODI strike rate. Ganguly insisted on Dravid's value, working with him to adapt his game and even having him keep wickets to balance the team. This strategic backing and flexibility were crucial in building a competitive Indian ODI side.

title: Fuel price hike: How much petrol, diesel, PNG and CNG cost in your city today?
content: Fuel prices have risen by Rs 3 per litre for petrol, diesel, and CNG. This hike follows a surge in global crude oil prices driven by Middle East tensions. After nearly four years of stable rates, oil companies faced significant daily losses. Consumers will now see increased costs for everyday transport and household fuel.

title: Roger Federer and Mirka Federer combined net worth 2026
content: By 2026, Roger Federer and Mirka Federer’s combined net worth will be one of the largest financial empires among athletes in sports history. The wealth has been built up by ATP prize money, record-breaking endorsement deals and strategic investments like On Running, showing the enduring brand power of tennis. Lifestyle management, family operations, and business direction are also big players in the game, along with Roger Federer and Mirka Federer.

title: Andre Agassi and Steffi Graf combined net worth 2026
content: Steffi Graf and Andre Agassi are a very recognizable tennis pair, and they have an estimated net worth in 2026 of $290 million. They’ve become wealthy by winning Grand Slams, signing multiyear contracts and other investments. Both benefited from the brand equity, business pursuits and financial planning that they developed during and after their successful professional tennis careers.

title: FIFA 2026 World Cup row erupts as fans demand BTS removal from Jungkook song
content: Fans are criticizing BigHit Music after BTS was reportedly credited on Jungkook’s solo FIFA World Cup song Dreamers. Many argued that Jungkook alone created and performed the track, calling the move unfair to his solo achievements. The backlash grew amid fresh buzz about BTS potentially performing at the 2026 FIFA World Cup halftime show, reigniting conversations about solo recognition, group branding, and BigHit’s marketing strategy surrounding Jungkook’s global success.

title: Watch: Rashmika drops F-bomb as she praises 'Cocktail 2' costar Kriti Sanon
content: Actress Rashmika Mandanna hilariously dropped an F-bomb while praising co-star Kriti Sanon's stunning look at the 'Cocktail 2' song launch.  The event, also attended by Shahid Kapoor, saw the team unveil a new track. Rashmika expressed excitement for the film's magical chemistry and spectacular scenes, hinting at more to come. 'Cocktail 2' releases June 19.

title: 'To promote peace, stability in Indo-Pacific': Rajnath Singh to visit Vietnam, S Korea
content: Defence minister Rajnath Singh is on a crucial multi-nation tour to Vietnam and South Korea, aiming to bolster strategic military ties, defense industry partnerships, and maritime collaboration. This visit follows recent high-level dialogues, underscoring India's commitment to enhancing security and stability within the Indo-Pacific region through strengthened bilateral engagements.

title: West Bengal raises upper age limit for state government job aspirants across all groups
content: The Government of West Bengal has revised upper age limits for state government recruitment across all groups. As per an official notification issued by the Finance Department, the upper age limit is now 41 years for Group A, 44 years for Group B, and 45 years for Group C and D posts. The change, effective from May 11, 2026, aims to broaden job eligibility and will apply under amended West Bengal service recruitment rules.

title: ‘It’s painful to watch’: Kaif’s brutal fielding criticism raises IPL 2026 alarm
content: IPL 2026 is witnessing a worrying decline in fielding standards, with a catching efficiency of just 77.9% across 59 matches. Former India cricketer Mohammad Kaif has led the criticism, highlighting repeated errors and poor catching. Rajasthan Royals skipper Riyan Parag also admitted that fielding lapses contributed to his team's recent defeat.

title: UAE nuclear plant strike revives India-Pak red line: What 1988 pact says
content: A drone attack on the UAE's Barakah Nuclear Energy Plant, the Arab world's sole operational nuclear facility, has sparked global concern. While authorities assure no radioactive leak, the incident highlights vulnerabilities in nuclear infrastructure. India condemned the strike as a dangerous escalation, urging restraint and dialogue amidst escalating regional tensions.

title: Rai of Hope: Punjab da putt-ar wins PGA title
content: Aaron Rai, a British golfer of Indian heritage, has achieved a historic victory at the 2026 PGA Championship, becoming the first of Indian origin to win a major golf title. His understated precision and remarkable 68-foot birdie putt secured his win against top players, marking a significant moment for Indian golf and diaspora success.

title: Police can’t just arrest people & forget them in jail: Delhi HC grants bail in NDPS case
content: The Court observed that the role of the police is not merely to arrest individuals and “dump them in jail” without diligently pursuing the prosecution thereafter.

title: After Twisha Sharma, another Noida woman dies by suicide over 'dowry harassment'
content: A 24-year-old woman allegedly died by suicide in Greater Noida after jumping from her roof, with her family accusing her husband and in-laws of dowry harassment. The incident occurred Sunday night, and police have registered an FIR and arrested the husband and father-in-law. Investigations are ongoing.

title: Jobs, AI, trade & more: Key outcomes of PM Modi’s Sweden visit
content: Prime Minister Modi wrapped up his tour in Sweden with a monumental advancement in India-Sweden relations, officially turning it into a Strategic Partnership. Highlights of this collaboration include a detailed action plan for the upcoming years (2026-2030) and a groundbreaking partnership on AI and quantum computing.

title: Man kills 23-yr-old pregnant wife by inserting hacksaw blade into private part
content: A man in Chhattisgarh's Surguja district allegedly killed his 23-year-old pregnant wife by inserting a hacksaw blade into her private part during a severe assault. The accused confessed to the brutal act, which occurred in the presence of their four-year-old daughter. The victim was three months pregnant and sustained multiple injuries.

title: ‘Told Ruturaj he is free not to take any advice’: Dhoni ahead of CSK’s final home game
content: MS Dhoni's potential final appearance at Chepauk sparks anticipation. He shared insights with captain Ruturaj Gaikwad, emphasising the captain's decision-making role and encouraging him to lead authentically. Dhoni also reflected on his genuine fan connection, attributing it to authenticity rather than deliberate effort, and highlighted the team's consistent focus on cricket as key to success.

title: Gold price prediction: Where are gold prices headed? Key levels to watch out
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are expected to move towards consolidation in the coming days as well, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

title: 'Parivartan': TMC shares video of new BJP MLA suggesting 'birth certificates for cows'
content: Newly elected BJP MLA Rekha Patra has caused a stir by demanding birth certificates for cattle being transported. She stated that cattle below 14 years cannot be slaughtered. This follows a state government notice reiterating a ban on cow slaughter without valid certification. Violators face imprisonment or fines.

title: 'Nobody is perfect': RR coach shuts down Sooryavanshi weakness talk
content: Rajasthan Royals' batting coach Vikram Rathour lamented Mitchell Starc's devastating over, which derailed their innings and handed Delhi Capitals momentum. Despite a strong start fueled by Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 46, RR faltered from 162/2 to 193/8. Rathour admitted they were 20 runs short, highlighting the crucial turning point and a fitness concern for Ravindra Jadeja.

title: Why is stock market down? Sensex, Nifty crash over 1%, Rs 7 lakh crore wiped out
content: The Sensex tumbled over 1,000 points to slip below the 74,300 mark, while the Nifty 50 dropped more than 300 points to trade under 23,350. The steep decline erased nearly Rs 7 lakh crore from the total market capitalisation of BSE-listed companies, reducing it to around Rs 454 lakh crore.

title: No more safe haven? Gold prices slip to six-week low as Middle East conflict drags on
content: Gold prices dropped to over a month's low as rising oil prices and Middle East tensions fueled investor anxiety, pushing them away from the safe-haven asset. Higher energy costs are also raising inflation concerns, increasing the likelihood of prolonged elevated interest rates from the US Federal Reserve.

title: RJ Mahvash breaks silence on Chahal relationship rumours after unfollow drama
content: RJ Mahvash addressed social media speculation about her relationship with Yuzvendra Chahal, clarifying that unfollowing each other on Instagram stemmed from a minor disagreement. She emphasized that such actions are common among friends and do not signify deeper issues, highlighting her loyalty and support for Chahal during his past mental health struggles.

title: 300+ military drones & Iran links: Did Cuba plan a strike on US naval base?
content: US intelligence suggests Cuba has acquired over 300 military drones, raising security concerns about potential attacks on American targets like Guantanamo Bay and Key West. CIA chief visited Havana, warning against hostilities and urging an end to its "totalitarian government." Cuba denies threatening war, asserting its right to self-defense amid growing defense ties with Russia and Iran.

title: Rupee falls to record low of 96.20 against US dollar; down 5.5% since Iran war began
content: The Indian rupee hit an all-time low against the US dollar, falling to 96.1650 amid escalating Middle East conflict and rising oil prices. This depreciation intensifies concerns over India's macroeconomic outlook, with authorities implementing measures to curb the decline and stabilize the currency.

title: IPL Playoffs: With 8 games to go, RCB officially qualify; DC’s chances rise to 19.5%
content: With eight games remaining, LSG and MI are out of playoff contention. RCB has qualified. GT are assured of a top-four points finish but could miss out. SRH have a high chance of making the top four. CSK and RR have less than even chances for the top four. PBKS, DC, and KKR's playoff hopes are diminishing.

title: 'Won't tolerate threat to security': UAE fumes after Iranian attack near nuclear plant
content: The UAE strongly condemned a drone strike on its Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, calling it a dangerous escalation and a threat to regional stability. Saudi Arabia also intercepted drones from Iraq. Amidst rising tensions, US President Trump warned Iran to act swiftly, while Tehran threatened retaliation against perceived US-Israeli aggression.

title: Ratlam’s Rajdhani deja vu: Two train fires, same place in Madhya Pradesh
content: Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh, witnessed a second Rajdhani train fire on May 17, 2026, mirroring an incident from April 18, 2011. Both blazes, occurring near Ratlam's railway division, thankfully resulted in no casualties, with passengers safely evacuated. While the 2026 fire caused limited damage, these recurring events place Ratlam in an unfortunate spotlight on the Rajdhani network.

title: 'Dangerous escalation': India expresses concern after Iranian drones target UAE nuclear facility
content: India expressed deep concern over Iranian drone attacks targeting the Barakah nuclear facility in the UAE, calling it a dangerous escalation. The strike, which caused a fire near an electrical generator but no injuries or leaks, has intensified regional tensions. The UAE condemned the act as unprovoked and a threat to its sovereignty.

title: PM Modi lands in Norway; to hold talks on trade, technology
content: PM Modi visit to Norway will mark the first visit by an Indian Prime Minister to the country in 43 years.

title: Shiv Sena (UBT) stages blockade on Samruddhi Expressway to protest low onion procurement rates
content: Ambadas Danve said, "The authorities did not grant permission for our agitation. But we are here to support onion farmers"

title: Haryana land deal case: Robert Vadra withdraws plea in Delhi High Court against trial court summons
content: The counsel for Robert Vadra said he would make “appropriate submissions” before the trial court at an “appropriate stage”

title: AAP leader Deepak Singla arrested by ED
content: Mr. Singla has been a candidate for the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) from the Vishwas Nagar Assembly seat. He was raided by the ED in 2024 too as part of an investigation

title: YSRCP holds protest against fuel price hike in Srikakulam, demands Centre to reduce charges
content: YSRCP leaders Appala Raju and Dhanunjaya Rao say fuel price hike will severely affect common man amid rising prices of essential commodities and inflation

title: Supreme Court grants bail to Anil Tuteja in Chhattisgarh mineral case
content: A Bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant directed Mr. Tuteja to stay outside Chhattisgarh in order to avoid influencing witnesses in the case

title: Space Meetings Veneto 2026: Nine Indian space startups sign multiple strategic collaborations in Italy
content: The nine Indian space-tech companies include Astrogate Labs, Astrobase Space Technologies, VyomIC, Suhora, Kepler Aerospace Ltd, Hyspace Technologies, TakeMe2Space, Jarbits Pvt Ltd and Dhruva Space.

title: Jute industry seeks new West Bengal government’s intervention to tide over raw material crisis
content: At least 14 mills across the Hooghly industrial belt have either suspended operations or are facing severe production disruptions, according to IJMA sources

title: PM Modi in Norway: PM Modi lands in Norway, to hold talks on trade, tech
content: PM Modi will also review the progress made in India-Norway relations and explore avenues to further strengthen them, with a focus on trade and investment, the Ministry of External Affairs said in a statement

title: Bail is the rule is not an empty slogan, even in UAPA and ‘terror’ cases: Supreme Court
content: The apex court notes that bail is the rule even in UAPA cases, questions its own judgment denying bail to Umar Khalid

title: Palaniswami’s actions show that AIADMK has weakened now: Finance Minister Sengottaiyan
content: ‘When Jayalalithaa became Chief Minister she too expanded the Cabinet gradually. Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay will decide on expanding the Cabinet and who will be a part of it’

title: DMK will rise like a phoenix, says Stalin
content: Mr. Stalin, while congratulating the new government, urged it to continue the welfare schemes implemented by his government

title: Nabin holds Odisha BJP core committee meeting, discusses strategies for next year's rural polls
content: "The national president discussed the party's strategies for panchayat polls next year, possible expansion of the Council of Ministers, and appointments of party leaders in different boards and corporations, and other issues," says a BJP source

title: V.D. Satheesan sworn in as the new Chief Minister of Kerala
content: Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar administered the oath of office and secrecy to Mr. Satheesan and the Ministers-designate over a one-hour ceremony

title: 19-year-old man succumbs to stab injuries after girlfriend’s family assaults him
content: On Sunday night, the woman, along with her father, uncle, and his friend, went to the bus stand to meet Sanjay. During the conversation, an altercation broke out between the parties, during which her uncle stabbed Sanjay with a knife

title: Supreme Court stays counting of Delhi Bar Council polls, asks HC to expedite hearing on tampering allegation
content: The CJI transferred the matter to a division bench of the High Court, urging the Chief Justice to constitute a Special Bench to hear the dispute on a day-to-day basis

title: A.P. CM Naidu suggests adding shrimp to Indian Army’s menu amid U.S. tariff crisis
content: 50% U.S. tariff has pushed tax burden on Indian shrimp exports to nearly 60%; 2.5 lakh aqua farmer families at risk

title: NEET UG paper leak: CBI arrests Renukai Chemistry Classes (RCC) founder Shivraj Raghunath Motegaonkar in Latur
content: On May 17, the CBI  conducted searches at the main office of Renukai Chemistry Classes (RCC) in Maharashtra’s Latur city

title: Tamil producer K. Rajan passes away
content: Rajan was best known for producing films such ‘Thangamana Thangachi’ (1991) and ‘Chinna Poovai Killathe’ (1992) and directing films like ‘Unarchigal’ (2005)

title: NEET UG leak: CBI conducts searches at Renukai Chemistry Classes in Latur
content: CBI officials began the search at Renukai Chemistry Classes in the city’s Shivnagar locality in the afternoon, and it was still underway till late evening

title: Suvendu Adhikari holds first 'janata darbar' after becoming CM
content: Several people, including students, participated in the interactions with the CM at the BJP office in Salt Lake area in Kolkata

title: Decision on letters submitted by both groups of AIADMK MLAs will be taken at appropriate time: Speaker J.C.D. Prabhakar
content: The Speaker says no specific time limit has been stipulated in Assembly Rules or law for taking a decision on letters submitted to the Speaker. He inspects playgrounds in his Thousand Lights constituency

title: ‘Dowry’ death of former judge’s daughter-in-law: Family members protest outside Madhya Pradesh CM’s residence
content: Family members accuse lawyer-husband Samarth Singh, demanding a fresh post-mortem examination at AIIMS Delhi

title: Forest Department restricts tourist entry at Berijam lake near Kodaikanal after tiger sighting
content: Officials say the restrictions will remain in effect till further notice. They add that the department’s staff are actively monitoring the area

title: Kurnool Municipal Corporation issues draft notification to delimit 52 wards into 68
content: Draft notification released on Monday; objections, suggestions to be accepted until 5 p.m. on May 24 at the city planning wing of the KMC office

title: DMK urges Centre to hand over Anaimangalam copper plates to Tamil Nadu
content: “The Government of Tamil Nadu too must, without delay, undertake appropriate efforts in this regard and ensure that they are brought back to their motherland,” said former Minister for Archaeology Thangam Thennarasu

title: Will seek CBI probe if AIADMK or AMMK legislators are made Ministers: Dhinakaran
content: Criticising Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay, he says the former earlier targeted the AIADMK by calling it a corrupt party, and questions the rationale behind AIADMK rebel legislators backing him now

title: Election Commission of India orders probe into voting by foreign nationals in 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly polls
content: A report has been sought from the returning officers of at least two cities and five districts across the State on how the foreigners managed to vote despite the Special Intensive Revision of the electoral rolls

title: About 25 foreign nationals arrested for fraudulent voting in Tamil Nadu Assembly poll
content: The accused persons, carrying foreign passports, were intercepted by officials of the Bureau of Immigration and detained by the police after indelible ink was found on their index fingers

title: A reality check on govt.’s claim of 45 days of LPG ‘rolling stock’
content: The Indian government’s claim of having 45 days’ worth of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) is met with skepticism as experts highlight discrepancies in storage capacity.

title: Plight of Sholavandan betel leaf farmers miserable as gale storms hit fields
content: The plight of the farmers’ was miserable that most of them are facing ‘red’ and were unable to stop the rising losses due to multiple factors

title: Summer festival season chokes Doddabetta Peak, conservationists call for curbs
content: The Nilgiris district police tried to implement curbs to ease traffic flow to the peak, by forcing visitors to take shuttle buses to the peak from the Doddabetta Junction

title: Amit Shah flags off 400 emergency response vehicles, 33 mobile forensic vans in Chhattisgarh
content: The new arrangement is expected to improve crime control, women and child safety, road accident response, medical assistance and support during emergencies, says the officials

title: Archaeology Department seeks to turn Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Town Hall into museum
content: Town Hall is said to have been constructed by the Nizamshahi general Malik Amber in the first quarter of the 17th century

title: Rajinikanth denies trying to broker deal between DMK and AIADMK
content: Rajinikanth asked how he could harbour envy against Mr. Vijay when there is a big generation gap between them

title: Rahul Gandhi to visit Raebareli for two days from May 19
content: Congress district president of Raebareli Pankaj Tiwari said Rahul Gandhi will address a public meeting in Khiron, and ‘mahila samvaad’ programme in Lalganj

title: Watch: Bonhomie at Thiruvananthapuram airport as Congress leaders arrive for swearing-in ceremony
content: Senior Congress leaders arrived in Thiruvananthapuram on May 18, to attend the swearing-in ceremony of new Kerala Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan and the UDF Cabinet.

title: Security forces launch operations in Manipur to rescue those who are still in captivity of armed groups
content: Area domination exercises and search operations are also being carried out in different parts of the hill district to rescue "all missing persons and arrest those responsible for holding hostages", says senior officer

title: KTR demands dismissal of Bandi Sanjay from Union Cabinet
content: The BRS leader says only such a move would allow a fair probe into the POCSO case against Mr. Sanjay’s son

title: Heatwave warning in seven Telangana districts on May 18, health department issues advisory
content: According to IMD, heatwave conditions are likely to prevail at isolated pockets in Adilabad, Kumaram Bheem Asifabad, Mancherial, Nirmal, Nizamabad, Jagtial and Rajanna Sircilla districts on May 18

title: U.P. BJP MLA seen riding motorcycle without helmet, asks police to levy fine
content: Shalabh Mani Tripathi wrote a letter to the police administration, requesting that appropriate action be taken and a fine be issued against him

title: Jana Sena, BJP likely to seek 25 of 62 divisions in Vizianagaram Municipal Corporation polls
content: NDA allies likely to press TDP for a bigger seat share; BJP eyes eight to ten divisions, Jana Sena hopes for at least a dozen

title: Polls to 16 seats in Maharashtra Legislative Council on June 18
content: The last date for filing nominations is June 1, and candidates can withdraw from the poll race by June 4, as per the notification

title: BJP SC Morcha holds Dappula Bharat Pradarshana for Ambedkar anniversary celebrations in Vijayawada
content: Sunday procession features thousands of ‘dappu’ artists; Andhra Pradesh Health Minister Y. Satya Kumar Yadav and BJP leaders offer floral tributes to Ambedkar statue

title: Woman killed, 20 persons injured as bus overturns in Chhattisgarh's Bastar
content: The accident took place in the early hours when the private bus was heading from the State capital Raipur to Sukma, says a police official

title: Deeply concerned: India on drone strike near UAE's Barakah nuclear plant
content: "India is deeply concerned at the attack targeting the Barakah nuclear facility in the UAE," says the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA)

title: K.P. Unnikrishnan, former Union Minister and senior Congress leader, passes away
content: He was the MP for Vadakara in Kozhikode from 1971 to 1996, representing three political parties. He first entered the upper House of Parliament in 1971 on a Congress ticket

title: Fire breaks out inside train in Bihar's Sasaram, no casualties reported
content: Smoke began billowing out of a compartment of the Sasaram-Patna passenger train while it was standing on platform number 6 at around 5.30 a.m., East Central Railway Chief Public Relations Officer Saraswati Chandra said

title: Indian student killed after minivan plunges off Chicago highway
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock.
